language.label: Language
common.emptySoon: Information will appear here as soon as it is available.
homepage.headline: Contextualized secure relationship platform.
homepage.subheadline: Create a secure link for each relationship context, filter contacts and centralize conversations in a private space.
homepage.step.create.title: 1. Create
homepage.step.filter.title: 2. Filter
homepage.step.exchange.title: 3. Exchange
homepage.step.exchange.text: Everything stays in a relationship case.
dashboard.title: My secure links
dashboard.recentActivity.title: Recent activity
studio.title: Relation Studio
studio.subtitle: Design, publish and test your relationship journeys.
studio.empty.title: No journeys yet
studio.empty.body: Create your first journey to manage secure links with a tailored form.
studio.createLinkWithJourney: Create a link with this journey
studio.businessBaseHelp: Choose a business base, then adjust fields in the editor.
studio.aiInstructions.title: AI Instructions
studio.aiInstructions.help: These instructions define the AI assistant behavior for this template.
studio.aiInstructions.safety: Business text only. Goodissima safety rules stay above these instructions and no instruction can trigger an automatic action.
studio.aiInstructions.future: Future-ready: tone, role, restrictions, allowed actions
studio.aiInstructions.placeholder: Example: review the case carefully, flag missing documents without inventing them, and suggest only verifiable next steps.
studio.aiInstructions.emptyFallback: Without instructions, the assistant uses a neutral Goodissima behavior.
studio.aiInstructions.example.realEstate: Check case consistency, flag missing supporting documents and stay factual about solvency.
studio.aiInstructions.example.recruitmen: Summarize fit for the role, highlight points to clarify and avoid any automatic decision.
Identify strategic interest, open questions and possible next steps without promising an outcome.
links.new.title: Create a secure link
links.new.noPublishedVersion: No published version: current execution if needed
links.new.noPublishedField: No published field for this journey.
links.created.title: Your link is ready to share
links.created.subtitle: This is the owner confirmation space. The conversation stays inactive until a candidate submits the public form.
links.created.noActiveConversationHelp: The relationship case will appear after the first candidate contact.
links.created.education: The secure conversation will be created automatically during the first candidate exchange.
analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.subtitle: Monitor relationship quality, journey conversion and operational friction.
analytics.global.activeRelationsHelp: Cases still moving and not finalized.
analytics.global.newCasesHelp: Cases created over the last 7 days.
analytics.global.openRequestsHelp: Actions to follow up with the team or contact.
analytics.global.avgResponseHelp: Average delay after a candidate message.
analytics.funnel.title: Relationship funnel
analytics.funnel.empty: No link created yet. The funnel will activate as soon as a journey is shared.
analytics.activity.title: Recent activity
analytics.activity.empty: Nothing to report yet. Messages, documents and validations will appear here.
analytics.performance.title: Journey performance
analytics.performance.subtitle: Business view by journey, focused on usage and blockers.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Govern the identity, security and notifications of your relationship platform.
settings.org.title: Organization
settings.org.name: Name
settings.org.logoEmpty: No logo configured. Goodissima will apply a clean default signature.
settings.org.brandingHelp: Shows the organization identity in shared journeys.
settings.security.title: Security
settings.security.recommended: Recommended: 14 days to keep a relationship active without leaving access open.
settings.security.emailProtectionHelp: Checks consistency between expected email and email used in the case.
settings.security.consentHelp: Makes consent explicit before collecting documents or sensitive information.
settings.notifications.title: Notifications
settings.notificationsPrivacy.title: Notifications & privacy
settings.notifications.emailHelp: Explicitly enables the private technical email channel. No email is sent without this consent.
settings.notifications.messagesHelp: Alerts the team when a contact replies in a case.
settings.notifications.documentsHelp: Highlights added files to speed up review.
settings.notifications.requestsHelp: Notifies when a relationship request is created or needs action.
settings.notifications.validationsHelp: Notifies when an important validation changes status.
settings.notifications.allOff: Email notifications are disabled for this account. You can turn them back on at any time.
settings.privacy.privateChannels: Emails remain private technical channels, never visible relationship identities.
settings.privacy.relationalHelp: Hides technical channels from dashboards, timelines and visible APIs.
settings.privacy.pseudonymizationHelp: Uses name, pseudonym, organization or role as the visible identity.
settings.demoReadyHelp: These settings structure the experience without exposing technical configuration.
feedback.title: Goodissima feedback
feedback.subtitle: Share a bug, UX friction or idea while the context is fresh.
feedback.placeholder: Example: I do not understand the difference between testing and publishing this journey...
feedback.empty: No message yet. One sentence is enough for the demo.
feedback.tooShort: Add a few words to qualify the feedback.
actions.title: Relationship requests
actions.subtitleOwner: Documents, validations and tasks linked to the case.
actions.emptyOwner: No request to follow yet. Create a document request, consent or validation when the case moves forward.
actions.emptyCandidate: No open request yet. You will be guided here if a validation or file is expected.
ai.summary.title: Goodissima AI Assistant
ai.summary.disclaimer: Suggestions are indicative and must be reviewed. No action is applied automatically.
ai.summary.summarizeTooltip: Generate an indicative relationship summary from the minimal context.
ai.summary.error: Unable to generate the AI summary
ai.summary.empty: Not enough content for a relevant AI analysis.
ai.summary.empty.missingDocuments: No missing document can be identified without inventing one.
ai.summary.futureAction: Creating an action from a suggestion requires human validation. Later: confidence score, dismiss suggestion, regenerate suggestions.
ai.summary.actionCreateError: Unable to create this suggested action
